title: AvA Mod
description: This mod adds things from AvA (Animation VS Animator), i hope you have fun playing the mod. Full credits to: Alan Becker for making the youtube series.
body: This mod adds things from AvA (Animation VS Animator), i hope you have fun playing the mod. Full credits go to Alan Becker for making the AvA Series. What things this mod adds: The Drawn Hammer, The Drawn Sword, The Drawn Spear, The Drawn Pickaxe, It also adds the laser gun from ava 4/IV. Features: Items from the AvA series are now into minecraft. Why you should want to doenload this mod: This mod adds things from AvA into minecraft, so if you like ava, you should get this mod!
